title: Sweet Bailey looking for his forever home
description: GEORGE NEWS - Bailey is a sweet and gentle...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - Bailey is a sweet and gentle 9-month-old pup who is patiently waiting for a family to call his own.


> He surrendered to the Garden Route SPCA (GRSPCA) when his previous owner could no longer care for him because he had too many dogs.


Though he has watched his friends find loving homes, he is still hoping for his turn.

With a kind heart and a friendly nature, Bailey gets along well with both people and other dogs.

He is a shy guy and gentle guy, but he has so much love to give and just needs someone to see the incredible companion he is.

Could you be the one to give Bailey the forever home he deserves?

If you’re looking for a loyal and affectionate friend, please go and meet Bailey -he’s ready to love you for a lifetime!


> For more information, or to adopt Bailey, please contact the GRSPCA on 044 878 1990.


Bailey is a handsome chap who will love you for the rest of his life.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
